case_title: FRANCISCO SILVA VS. DOOR DASH, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,497.11 FILED BY SILVA, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVA, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC. $685.55 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.55 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-08-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAR-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVA, FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC.
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED (HEARING SET FOR MAY-13-2022 A 10AM)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DOOR DASH 303 2ND ST., SF., CA 94107

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO SILVA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOOR DASH, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
